module_summaries.summary:
Line 1: Users can log in or access courses as guests.
Line 2: Displays login form and guest access option.

Line 1: Users can view upcoming activities and manage events.
Line 2: Displays timeline and calendar with deadlines.

Line 1: Users can filter and search their enrolled courses.
Line 2: Displays course cards with images and categories.

Line 1: Users can navigate and view course content sections.
Line 2: Displays full course name and organized sections.

Line 1: Users can add and manage course activities.
Line 2: Displays editing tools and activity options.

Line 1: Users can configure course settings and properties.
Line 2: Displays course details and configuration options.

Line 1: Users can manage course participants and enrollment.
Line 2: Displays participant list and filtering options.

Line 1: Users can view and manage assignment details.
Line 2: Displays assignment information and grading options.

Line 1: Users can filter and grade student submissions.
Line 2: Displays submission table with grading options.

Line 1: Users can create and manage advanced grading forms.
Line 2: Displays grading method options and notifications.

Line 1: Users can view and filter grade reports.
Line 2: Displays gradebook with user grades and course totals.

Line 1: Users can view and edit their profile information.
Line 2: Displays user details and profile description.

test_cases.title: Successful login with valid username and password
steps: Enter a valid username in the Username field
Enter a valid password in the Password field
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Redirects to the Dashboard

test_cases.title: Username field empty
steps: Leave the Username field empty
Enter a valid password in the Password field
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message appears indicating the Username field is required

test_cases.title: Password field empty
steps: Enter a valid username in the Username field
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message appears indicating the Password field is required

test_cases.title: Invalid credentials
steps: Enter an invalid username in the Username field
Enter an invalid password in the Password field
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message appears indicating invalid credentials

test_cases.title: Username field remains populated after error
steps: Enter an invalid username in the Username field
Enter an invalid password in the Password field
Click the Log in button
test_cases.expected_result: Username field remains populated for correction after error

test_cases.title: Check presence of 'Lost password?' link
steps: Verify the presence of the 'Lost password?' link on the page
test_cases.expected_result: 'Lost password?' link is displayed on the page

test_cases.title: Check presence of 'Access as a guest' button
steps: Verify the presence of the 'Access as a guest' button on the page
test_cases.expected_result: 'Access as a guest' button is displayed on the page

test_cases.title: Check presence of Cookies notice button
steps: Verify the presence of the Cookies notice button on the page
test_cases.expected_result: Cookies notice button is displayed on the page

test_cases.title: Display user greeting with waving hand emoji
steps: Verify the greeting message 'Hi, [Name]!' is displayed with a waving hand emoji
test_cases.expected_result: Greeting message is displayed correctly with the emoji

test_cases.title: Display 'No activities require action' message when no pending activities
steps: Verify the message 'No activities require action' is displayed with the appropriate icon
test_cases.expected_result: Message is displayed correctly with the icon

test_cases.title: Highlight current date on the calendar
steps: Verify the current date is highlighted on the calendar
test_cases.expected_result: Current date is highlighted

test_cases.title: Display event names on dates with events
steps: Verify dates with events display the event names
test_cases.expected_result: Event names are displayed on the respective dates

test_cases.title: Verify 'New event' button functionality
steps: Click on the 'New event' button
test_cases.expected_result: A new event creation form is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify 'Next 7 days' dropdown functionality
steps: Click on the 'Next 7 days' dropdown
Select an option from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The calendar updates to show events for the selected period

test_cases.title: Verify 'Sort by dates' dropdown functionality
steps: Click on the 'Sort by dates' dropdown
Select an option from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The events are sorted according to the selected option

test_cases.title: Verify 'All courses' dropdown functionality
test_cases.preconditions: User is enrolled in multiple courses
steps: Click on the 'All courses' dropdown
Select a specific course
test_cases.expected_result: The calendar updates to show events related to the selected course

test_cases.title: Verify 'Full calendar' link functionality
steps: Click on the 'Full calendar' link
test_cases.expected_result: The full calendar view is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify 'Import or export calendars' link functionality
steps: Click on the 'Import or export calendars' link
test_cases.expected_result: The import/export calendar options are displayed

test_cases.title: Verify 'Edit mode' toggle functionality
steps: Toggle the 'Edit mode' switch
test_cases.expected_result: The page enters or exits edit mode

test_cases.title: Verify 'Reset page to default' button functionality
steps: Click on the 'Reset page to default' button
test_cases.expected_result: The page layout resets to the default configuration

test_cases.title: Verify '+ Add a block' button functionality
steps: Click on the '+ Add a block' button
test_cases.expected_result: The 'Add a block' modal is displayed

test_cases.title: Verify 'Cancel' button in 'Add a block' modal
steps: Click on the 'Cancel' button
test_cases.expected_result: The 'Add a block' modal is closed without adding a block

test_cases.title: Verify 'X' button in 'Add a block' modal
steps: Click on the 'X' button
test_cases.expected_result: The 'Add a block' modal is closed without adding a block

test_cases.title: Verify My Courses page displays correct headings
steps: Check for the presence of 'My courses' heading
Check for the presence of 'Course overview' subheading
test_cases.expected_result: Both headings are displayed correctly

test_cases.title: Verify courses are displayed as visual cards
steps: Verify each course is displayed as a visual card
test_cases.expected_result: Courses are displayed as visual cards

test_cases.title: Verify search functionality
steps: Enter a course name in the search field
Press enter or click the search icon
test_cases.expected_result: Courses matching the search criteria are displayed

test_cases.title: Verify course card displays course image
steps: Check for the presence of a course image on each course card
test_cases.expected_result: Course image is displayed on each course card

test_cases.title: Verify course card displays course name as a link
steps: Check for the presence of a course name link on each course card
test_cases.expected_result: Course name is displayed as a clickable link on each course card

test_cases.title: Verify course card displays category name
steps: Check for the presence of a category name on each course card
test_cases.expected_result: Category name is displayed on each course card

test_cases.title: Verify functionality of 'All' dropdown
steps: Click on the 'All' dropdown
Select an option from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Courses are filtered based on the selected option

test_cases.title: Verify sorting by course name
steps: Select an option from the 'Sort by course name' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Courses are sorted according to the selected option

test_cases.title: Verify 'Star this course' option functionality
steps: Click on the three-dot menu on a course card
Select 'Star this course' option
test_cases.expected_result: Course is marked as starred

test_cases.title: Verify 'Remove from view' option functionality
steps: Click on the three-dot menu on a course card
Select 'Remove from view' option
test_cases.expected_result: Course is removed from the current view

test_cases.title: Verify course full name is displayed as heading
steps: Check the course full name is displayed at the top of the page
test_cases.expected_result: Course full name is displayed correctly as a heading

test_cases.title: Verify Course tab is clickable
steps: Click on the Course tab
test_cases.expected_result: Course tab is clickable and navigates to the course content

test_cases.title: Verify Course Index is displayed
steps: Check the Course Index is displayed on the page
test_cases.expected_result: Course Index is visible and displays the course structure

test_cases.title: Verify Settings tab is clickable
steps: Click on the Settings tab
test_cases.expected_result: Settings tab is clickable and navigates to the settings page

test_cases.title: Verify Participants tab is clickable
steps: Click on the Participants tab
test_cases.expected_result: Participants tab is clickable and navigates to the participants list

test_cases.title: Verify Grades tab is clickable
steps: Click on the Grades tab
test_cases.expected_result: Grades tab is clickable and navigates to the grades overview

test_cases.title: Verify Activities tab is clickable
steps: Click on the Activities tab
test_cases.expected_result: Activities tab is clickable and navigates to the activities section

test_cases.title: Verify Collapse all link collapses sections
steps: Click on the Collapse all link
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are collapsed

test_cases.title: Verify Chevron arrow expands a section
steps: Click on the Chevron arrow next to a section name
test_cases.expected_result: The section expands to show its content

test_cases.title: Verify Close course index button hides the index
steps: Click on the Close course index button
test_cases.expected_result: Course Index is hidden

test_cases.title: Verify More dropdown is clickable
steps: Click on the More dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: More dropdown is clickable and displays additional options

test_cases.title: Enable edit mode
steps: Click on the edit mode toggle
test_cases.expected_result: Edit mode is enabled

test_cases.title: Open Activity Chooser
steps: Click on the + button
Select 'Add an activity or resource' option
test_cases.expected_result: Activity Chooser modal is displayed

test_cases.title: Add Assignment activity
steps: Select 'Assignment' option from the grid
Click on the Add button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment activity is added to the course section

test_cases.title: Add Book resource
steps: Select 'Book' option from the grid
Click on the Add button
test_cases.expected_result: Book resource is added to the course section

test_cases.title: Create new assignment with valid data and save to course
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a valid description
Check 'Display description on course page'
Enter valid activity instructions
Upload valid additional files within size limit
Set valid 'Allow submissions from' date/time
Set valid 'Due date' date/time
Set valid 'Cut-off date' date/time
Set valid 'Remind me to grade by' date/time
Check 'Always show description'
Check 'Online text'
Check 'File submissions'
Select maximum number of uploaded files
Select maximum submission size within limit
Enter valid accepted file types
Check 'Send content change notification'
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and user is returned to the course page

test_cases.title: Create new assignment with valid data and save and display
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a valid description
Check 'Display description on course page'
Enter valid activity instructions
Upload valid additional files within size limit
Set valid 'Allow submissions from' date/time
Set valid 'Due date' date/time
Set valid 'Cut-off date' date/time
Set valid 'Remind me to grade by' date/time
Check 'Always show description'
Check 'Online text'
Check 'File submissions'
Select maximum number of uploaded files
Select maximum submission size within limit
Enter valid accepted file types
Check 'Send content change notification'
Click 'Save and display' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and displayed

test_cases.title: Assignment name field empty
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Leave assignment name field empty
Enter a valid description
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the assignment name is required

test_cases.title: Search for an activity
steps: Enter a valid activity name in the search field
test_cases.expected_result: Relevant activities are filtered and displayed

test_cases.title: Filter by Assessment category
steps: Select 'Assessment' from category filters
test_cases.expected_result: Only activities under Assessment category are displayed

test_cases.title: Cancel assignment creation
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Enter a valid description
Click 'Cancel' button
test_cases.expected_result: No assignment is created and changes are discarded

test_cases.title: Add activity with invalid search
steps: Enter an invalid activity name in the search field
test_cases.expected_result: No activities are displayed

test_cases.title: Add activity without selecting
steps: Click on the Add button without selecting an activity
test_cases.expected_result: No activity is added; user is prompted to select an activity

test_cases.title: Upload file exceeding maximum size limit
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Upload a file exceeding 100 MB
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating file size exceeds the maximum limit

test_cases.title: Set 'Allow submissions from' date after 'Due date'
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Set 'Allow submissions from' date after 'Due date'
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid date configuration

test_cases.title: Set 'Due date' before 'Allow submissions from' date
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Set 'Due date' before 'Allow submissions from' date
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid date configuration

test_cases.title: Set 'Cut-off date' before 'Due date'
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Set 'Cut-off date' before 'Due date'
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid date configuration

test_cases.title: Set 'Remind me to grade by' date before 'Due date'
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Set 'Remind me to grade by' date before 'Due date'
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid date configuration

test_cases.title: Maximum submission size exceeds site upload limit
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Select maximum submission size exceeding 100 MB
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating submission size exceeds site upload limit

test_cases.title: Close Activity Chooser
steps: Click on the X button
test_cases.expected_result: Activity Chooser modal is closed

test_cases.title: Star an activity
steps: Click on the Star button next to an activity
test_cases.expected_result: Activity is marked as starred

test_cases.title: Set same start and end date for 'Allow submissions from' and 'Due date'
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Set same date/time for 'Allow submissions from' and 'Due date'
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created with the same start and end date

test_cases.title: Set future date for 'Allow submissions from'
test_cases.workflow: Create and configure a new assignment
steps: Enter a valid assignment name
Set future date for 'Allow submissions from'
Click 'Save and return to course' button
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created with future 'Allow submissions from' date

test_cases.title: Configure course settings with all required fields filled

Enter a valid course short name
Select a valid course category from the dropdown
Click the Save and display button

Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Course image is uploaded and displayed successfully

test_cases.title: Course full name field empty
steps: Leave the course full name field empty
Enter a valid course short name
Select a valid course category from the dropdown
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating course full name is required

test_cases.title: Course short name field empty
steps: Enter a valid course full name
Leave the course short name field empty
Select a valid course category from the dropdown
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating course short name is required

test_cases.title: Course category field empty
steps: Enter a valid course full name
Enter a valid course short name
Leave the course category field empty
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating course category is required

test_cases.title: Set course end date in the past
steps: Select a past date for the course end date
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating course end date cannot be in the past

test_cases.title: Upload an invalid file type as course image
steps: Attempt to upload an invalid file type in the file upload area for course images
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating invalid file type

test_cases.title: Verify course visibility dropdown default selection
steps: Check the default selection of the course visibility dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Default selection is set to the expected value

test_cases.title: Verify maximum upload size dropdown default selection
steps: Check the default selection of the maximum upload size dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Default selection is set to the expected value

test_cases.title: Set course start date and end date to the same day
steps: Select the same date for course start date and course end date
Click the Save and display button
test_cases.expected_result: Course settings are saved successfully with the same start and end date

test_cases.title: Apply filter by name
steps: Select 'Name' from the filter dropdown
Enter a valid name
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants matching the name

test_cases.title: Apply filter by attribute
steps: Select an attribute from the filter dropdown
Enter a valid attribute value
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants matching the attribute

test_cases.title: Enroll user using username
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid username in the search field
Select a role from the role dropdown
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled in the course

test_cases.title: Enroll user using email
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid email in the search field
Select a role from the role dropdown
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled in the course

test_cases.title: Add multiple filter conditions
steps: Click on '+ Add condition' link
Select 'Name' from the first filter dropdown
Enter a valid name
Select an attribute from the second filter dropdown
Enter a valid attribute value
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants matching all conditions

test_cases.title: Clear filters
steps: Click on 'Clear filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: All filters are removed and count displays total number of participants

test_cases.title: Apply alphabetical filter
steps: Click on an alphabetical filter button (e.g., 'A')
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants whose names start with the selected letter

test_cases.title: Enroll user with specific enrollment duration
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid username in the search field
Select a role from the role dropdown
Set a specific enrollment duration
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled with the specified duration

test_cases.title: Verify Enrol users button is displayed
steps: Check if the Enrol users button is visible on the page
test_cases.expected_result: Enrol users button is displayed

test_cases.title: Filter with empty name field
steps: Select 'Name' from the filter dropdown
Leave the name field empty
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: No participants are displayed and count shows zero

test_cases.title: Filter with empty attribute field
steps: Select an attribute from the filter dropdown
Leave the attribute field empty
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: No participants are displayed and count shows zero

test_cases.title: Search field empty
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Leave the search field empty
Select a role from the role dropdown
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: Error message is displayed indicating the search field cannot be empty

test_cases.title: Role not selected
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid username in the search field
Leave the role dropdown unselected
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: Error message is displayed indicating a role must be selected

test_cases.title: Filter with special characters in name
steps: Select 'Name' from the filter dropdown
Enter special characters in the name field
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants matching the special character criteria

test_cases.title: Filter with maximum length name
steps: Select 'Name' from the filter dropdown
Enter a name with maximum allowed length
Click on 'Apply filters' button
test_cases.expected_result: Count displays the number of participants matching the maximum length name

test_cases.title: Enroll user with maximum enrollment duration
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid username in the search field
Select a role from the role dropdown
Set the maximum allowed enrollment duration
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled with the maximum duration

test_cases.title: Enroll user with minimum enrollment duration
steps: Click on the Enrol users button
Enter a valid username in the search field
Select a role from the role dropdown
Set the minimum allowed enrollment duration
Click on the Enrol users button at bottom right
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully enrolled with the minimum duration

test_cases.title: Save changes with valid data in all columns

Enter valid data in r column
Enter valid data in Course total column
Click the Save changes button

test_cases.title: Verify columns are displayed correctly in Edit mode
test_cases.workflow: Save changes when Edit mode is enabled
steps: Verify that the BUS301 - Case Study Analysis column is visible
Verify that the BUS301 - Business Plan Draft column is visible
Verify that the BUS301 - Final Presentation column is visible
Verify that the r column is visible
Verify that the Course total column is visible

test_cases.title: Save changes with empty BUS301 - Case Study Analysis column
test_cases.workflow: Save changes when Edit mode is enabled
steps: Leave the BUS301 - Case Study Analysis column empty
Enter valid data in BUS301 - Business Plan Draft column
Enter valid data in BUS301 - Final Presentation column
Enter valid data in r column
Enter valid data in Course total column

test_cases.title: Verify profile page elements are displayed correctly

Check if Profile link is visible
Check if User's circular icon is present
Check if Full name is displayed
Check if Message button is visible
Check if Description text is present
Check if Reset page to default button is visible
Check if User details card is displayed
Check if Edit profile link is visible
test_cases.expected_result: All profile page elements are displayed correctly

test_cases.title: Update profile with valid data

Enter valid last name
Enter valid email address
Select a timezone from the dropdown
Enter a description in the rich text editor
Click on the Update profile button
